Bus Timings

14 Bus Timings Oud Metha Bus Station to Safa, Terminus and Back

May 26, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

New to town? No sweat. This route hits all the major landmarks, so you can’t get lost if you tried.

And forget about checking schedules - these buses show up faster than you can say “habibi.” Whether you’re a local dodging traffic or a tourist playing explorer, Bus 14’s got you covered. It’s basically your personal tour guide on wheels, minus the cheesy jokes. Hop on Bus 14 and let’s roll!

Route Name 14
Route Description Oud Metha Bus Station · 8 Safa, Terminus - Oud Metha Bus Station · 8
Total Distance Approximately 20 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 25-30 minutes
Operational Hours 05:00 to 00:11 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 3
Official Website RTA Dubai

Bus 14 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

Bus 14 operates frequently throughout the day, making it convenient for passengers to plan their trips. Below are the bus timings:

Bus 14 Timetable

For the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website or click on this link for 14 Bus Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for Bus 14 is determined by the number of zones traveled, with a standard rate of AED 3 for a single zone. The fare structure ensures that passengers can access different parts of the city without breaking the bank.

Bus Booking

Currently, Bus 14 does not offer online booking options. Passengers can purchase tickets directly on the bus or at designated bus stations. To make trip planning easier, the RTA Dubai app provides real-time updates on bus schedules and route details, ensuring that you have the latest information at your fingertips.

Bus Route

Bus 14 operates between Oud Metha Bus Station · 8 and Safa, Terminus. Along the way, it stops at various points of interest and essential services, making it a comprehensive route for those traveling across Dubai. The route covers the following stops:

  1. Oud Metha Bus Station · 8

  2. Umm Hurair, Road, 2

  3. Al Wasl University

  4. Central Post Office

  5. Dubai Municipality Center

  6. Center Point

  7. Kuwait Road

  8. Sheikh Rashid Road Intersection

  9. Hudheiba, Turnoff

  10. Hana Center

  11. Satwa, Masjid

  12. Satwa, Clinic

  13. Bada

  14. Satwa Square

  15. Khadri Masjid

  16. Bilal Bin Ribah School

  17. Satwa Road

  18. Rehabilitation Center

  19. City Walk

  20. Mazaya Center

  21. Safest Way

  22. Safest Way

  23. Business Bay Metro Seaside

  24. Lufthansa

  25. Safa, Terminus

  26. Safest Way

  27. DEWA Al Wasl Customer Happiness Center

  28. City Walk

  16. Karama Ent.

  18. Al Wasl University

  19. Broadcast Interchange

  20. Rashid Hospital Roundabout

  21. Oud Metha Bus Station · 8

Bus 14 Station Overview

Oud Metha Bus Station · 8

Oud Metha Bus Station is a well-known transit hub in Dubai, offering a variety of amenities for passengers. Located in the bustling Oud Metha area, this station serves as a key stop for Bus 14, providing easy access to nearby schools, healthcare facilities, and shopping centers. The station’s strategic location makes it an essential point for both daily commuters and those traveling through the area, with well-maintained facilities ensuring a comfortable transit experience.

Business Bay Metro Station Seaside Bus Stop Intersection

Business Bay Metro Station Seaside Bus Stop is a crucial intersection where Bus Routes 7, 9, 14, 91, and F20 converge. This stop serves as a vital connection point for passengers traveling within the Business Bay area and to various destinations across Dubai. Its strategic location near major business and residential areas makes it a convenient choice for daily commuters and travelers seeking easy access to key parts of the city.

Safa, Terminus

The Safa Terminus is the final stop on Bus 14’s route, situated in the tranquil Safa area. This station provides passengers with access to nearby parks, residential areas, and local attractions. As a terminus, it marks the end of the route and is equipped with essential amenities for travelers concluding their journey.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

Bus 14 passes through several locations in Dubai that are of interest to tourists. Here are some notable attractions and destinations along the route: 1.

  1. Dubai Frame: A short distance away, this iconic structure offers panoramic views of both the historic and modern parts of Dubai. It’s a popular tourist attraction for those interested in the city’s skyline.

3.

  1. City Walk: A contemporary outdoor shopping and dining destination, City Walk offers a variety of luxury boutiques, cafes, restaurants, and entertainment venues.

  2. Mazaya Shopping Center: A smaller mall but offers various retail options and eateries. It’s a convenient stop for quick shopping and dining.

  3. There are boat tours, restaurants, and great views of the city skyline.

  4. Jumeirah Beach: Close to these stops, Jumeirah Beach is one of Dubai’s most famous beaches, offering stunning views of the Burj Al Arab, white sands, and a host of beachside activities.

  5. Dubai Garden Glow: Located near the interchange, this attraction is a themed park with creative light displays, making it a great spot for an evening visit.

Journey Experience

The 14 bus route from Oud Metha Bus Station to Safa, Terminus, and back offers an extensive and intriguing journey through some of Dubai’s noteworthy neighborhoods.

The route continues towards Safa, where travelers are treated to the lush greenery of Safa Park, a perfect spot for relaxation and picnics amid the bustling city.

The return journey allows for additional sightseeing opportunities, as the bus meanders through both modern developments and historical sites.

Travelling with Careem

Using the Careem app, you can conveniently reach Safa, Terminus, the furthest point on Bus 14’s route starting from Oud Metha Bus Station. The estimated price range for this journey is between AED 42-50, offering a quick and hassle-free alternative for those who prefer a direct ride to the terminus.

With its extensive route, frequent service, and affordable pricing, Bus 14 is a reliable and convenient option for traveling across Dubai. Whether you’re a daily commuter or a visitor exploring the city, Bus 14 connects you to key destinations with ease.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: May 26, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
